captures.label: Inventory Orders
captures.headline: Every brand commission lands here, in one queue.
captures.caption: Cici Label, LeAtelier, GOF — they all push the same row shape. You see partner status, run status, last update. Filter, sort, search.

captures.label: Order detail with activity timeline
captures.headline: Same trail, both ends. Customer sees what you ship against.
captures.caption: Requested · Fulfilled · Remaining for every line. An activities log on the right — assigned → started → completed — that mirrors back to the customer's tracking page.

captures.label: Products
captures.headline: Your catalogue, your variants, your stock.
captures.caption: One product per garment, variants for size and colour, sales channel pre-bound to your storefront. Stock travels with the inventory order, not a separate dance.
